Cybersecurity and Privacy Cognate Area

This cognate area is based on the perspective that a comprehensive and effective understanding of issues surrounding cybersecurity should encompass both technological and human aspects. This cognate area helps students equip themselves with human-centered cybersecurity skills and perspectives, and prepare to launch careers in

57

2 Information Science Major

the cybersecurity ﬁeld with particular emphasis on management, policy, and governance-related functions.
